topics.title: Host Illness and Workplace Dynamics
topics.summary: The show begins with a host describing his physical illness while discussing personal boundaries, workplace tensions involving coworkers like Sal and Gary, and the exclusion of certain staff from private family events.

topics.title: CBS Lawsuit Against Howard Stern
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal battle between CBS and Howard Stern, criticizing executive Les Moonves' management of the radio division during the transition to Sirius Satellite Radio.

topics.title: Hollywood Legal Battles and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a lawsuit involving a radio executive, the public perception of an industry figure, and various celebrity performances at award shows.

topics.title: Oscar Party Recaps and Show Planning
topics.summary: The studio discusses highlights from a recent Oscar party, critiques of award show production choices, and logistical preparations for upcoming radio segments featuring various guests.

topics.title: Celebrity Party and Academy Awards Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses the contents of gift bags from a recent celebrity event, the guest list of attendees, and highlights from the Academy Awards.

topics.title: CBS Lawsuit Against Howard Stern
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal battle between CBS and Howard Stern, criticizing executive Les Moonves for what they characterize as a desperate and poorly managed lawsuit following Stern's move to Sirius.

topics.title: Legal Conflict with CBS Executive
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal battle against Les Moonves, criticizing his leadership of the radio division and predicting that the lawsuit will expose his professional failings.

topics.title: Whack Pack Revelations and Studio Antics
topics.summary: The studio features the Whack Pack members sharing personal revelations while discussing technical issues with microphones, weight loss journeys, and upcoming show segments.

topics.title: Shocking Personal Revelations
topics.summary: The studio participants share and react to a series of graphic personal anecdotes involving past sexual encounters and intoxicated incidents.

topics.title: Confessions of Deception and Personal History
topics.summary: The studio features a series of personal revelations including an admission of a sexual encounter, a confession regarding the theft of money from a blind neighbor, and a discussion on personal values and family background.

topics.title: Promotional Plugs and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features various guests providing promotional segments for comedy shows and websites before transitioning into a discussion about religious upbringing, cultural experiences in minority neighborhoods, and personal anxieties.

topics.title: Upcoming Radio Programming and Television News
topics.summary: The studio previews upcoming segments including the Whack Pack, Page 69, and a reunion with the Leather Weather Lady, while also discussing Michael Jackson's family dynamics and the proliferation of niche cable television channels.

topics.title: Undercover Strip Club Investigation
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where Tyra goes undercover as a stripper to investigate the male obsession with strip clubs and later features an interview with a man who claims to be recovering from a strip club addiction.

topics.title: Studio Tour and Health Trends
topics.summary: The studio hosts a listener for a tour while discussing personal anecdotes, local news regarding public figures, and the health implications of fast food on children.

topics.title: Health Trends and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses the health impacts of soda consumption, reports on a high-profile sex trafficking case involving a wealthy lawyer, reviews recent Oscar winners, and covers news regarding the Iraq War, the Pat Tillman investigation, cruise ship safety, and celebrity headlines.
